name: Burden of Proof Shift in Transferee Liability

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who have received assets (transferees) and are being pursued by the IRS for the transferor's tax liabilities.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: In Tax Court proceedings, the burden of proof is on the IRS to prove that a petitioner is liable as a transferee of property. This provides a strategic defense advantage to avoid paying a predecessor's tax debts.
